definition: A confirmed purchase transaction placed by a customer. An order may contain one or more line items. Status can be: completed, returned, or cancelled.
A single product line within an order. Represents the quantity and price of one SKU purchased in a given transaction.
Sum of line_total for all completed order items within a given period. Excludes returned and cancelled orders.
Total revenue divided by the number of completed orders in a period. Used as a proxy for customer spending power.
Classification of a customer into Standard, Premium, or VIP based on cumulative lifetime spend. Assigned at CRM registration.
One of five commercial territories in Spain: Madrid, Barcelona, Valencia, Sevilla, Bilbao. Each region has a designated manager.
Monthly revenue goal set by Finance per region. Used to calculate attainment and flag underperforming territories.
The sales channel through which an order was placed. Values: web, mobile, marketplace.
